settings.title: Service Area
settings.text:
Portland metro including Beaverton, Lake Oswego, Tigard, Hillsboro, and Gresham.

On-site visits throughout the metro area. Remote support available statewide.

settings.title: Emergency?
settings.text: Managed clients with a priority plan can reach us 24/7 at (503) 555-0142.

settings.title: How fast can you get here?
settings.text: For managed clients, remote support begins within 15 minutes during business hours. On-site visits are typically same-day. Break-fix clients are scheduled based on availability, usually within 24 hours.

settings.title: What does managed IT cost?
settings.text: Plans start at $99 per user per month and include monitoring, help desk, security, and backups. We scope every plan to the client — no two are exactly alike. Call us for a quote.

settings.title: Do you support Mac and Linux?
settings.text: Yes. Our team supports Windows, macOS, and common Linux distributions. Most of our managed clients run Windows, but we handle mixed environments regularly.

settings.title: What happens if something breaks after hours?
settings.text: Managed clients with a priority support plan have access to our emergency line 24/7. Break-fix clients are served during regular business hours, Monday through Friday.

settings.title: Do you work with home offices?
settings.text: Yes. We support remote workers, freelancers, and anyone who works from home and needs reliable IT. Same services, same response time, same team.
